final:
module RefModule(
	input wire clk,
	input wire reset,
	input wire enable,
	input wire [31:0]d,
	output reg [31:0]q
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always@(posedge clk or posedge reset  or posedge dbg_halt) begin
	if (reset) begin 
		q<=32'd0;
	end else begin 
		if(enable) begin 
			q<=d;
		end 		
	end
end
endmodule
